summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GAULS BASTARDS motorcycle club website. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend /api/contact form submission and validation working
Hero section displays correctly with logo, title 'GAULS BASTARDS', and 'RIDE CUSTOM' tagline
Navigation works - all menu links scroll to correct sections
Social media links (Facebook, Instagram, TikTok) present and clickable
About section displays club description and 4 values cards
Gallery section displays 12 photos with working lightbox functionality
Contact form has all required fields and submits successfully to /api/contact
Mobile responsive - mobile menu toggle works correctly
SEO meta tags present and correct (title, description, og:tags)
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (7/7 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (13/13 features tested successfully)
